welcome.scratchPersisted: {{count}} Untitled tab(s) saved to buffer — recover from Home

haiku.0: old pond — a frog jumps in, sound of water.
haiku.1: such silence — the cicadas' voice seeps into the rocks.
haiku.2: out of the way, little sparrow — the horse is passing.
haiku.3: thin frog — don't give up, Issa is here with you.
haiku.4: morning glory took the bucket — I borrow water.
haiku.5: rape flowers — moon to the east, sun to the west.
haiku.6: green leaves before me, cuckoo on the mountain, first bonito.
haiku.7: summer grass — all that remains of the warriors' dreams.
haiku.8: snow melting — the village full of children.
haiku.9: come, play with me — orphan sparrow.
haiku.10: biting a persimmon — the bell rings at Hōryū-ji.
haiku.11: this road — no one travels it, autumn dusk.

ai.title: Agent · AI
ai.intro: Daisu connects to an LLM provider for chat, completions and agents. Defaults to local Ollama (privacy, no key). Switch to a cloud provider if you want Claude, GPT or Gemini.
ai.modelHint: E.g.: llama3.2, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, gpt-4o-mini. Verify the exact ID in the provider documentation.
ai.detectNoModels: Ollama running but no models installed. Run `ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:7b` (or any model) and detect again.
ai.baseUrlHint: Local server endpoint. Ollama default http://localhost:11434; LM Studio default http://localhost:1234/v1.
ai.apiKeyDesc: Stored in the operating system keychain (Windows Credential Manager). Never written to disk in plain text.
ai.indexFullHint: Daisu indexes functions, structs, classes and types in the workspace via tree-sitter + SQLite FTS5. Used for fast search (Ctrl+T) and agent context. Vector embeddings — deferred to a later phase.
ai.permissionsDesc: Tool list with persisted decisions for the current workspace. Delete to be asked for confirmation again.
ai.openWorkspaceForPerms: Open a workspace to view permissions.

integrations.discordHint: Shows in your Discord profile what you are editing. Requires Discord open on the device. If Discord is not active, the connection fails silently.
integrations.enableDesc: Connects to Discord on Daisu startup and publishes activity.
integrations.showProjectDesc: Publishes the name of the open folder as context.
integrations.showFileDesc: Publishes the name of the active file. Disable for privacy.
integrations.appIdHint: Discord application ID (Discord Developer Portal). Use the default unless you have your own app with custom assets.

mcp.hint: Model Context Protocol servers. Each server exposes tools the agent can invoke at runtime. SSE transport not yet implemented.
mcp.name: Name
mcp.duplicate: A server with that name already exists.

inlineEdit.title: Edit proposal
inlineEdit.noDiffs: No differences between current file and proposal.

configPanel.title: Settings
configPanel.footer: API keys are stored in the operating system keychain. Change provider, model or credentials from Settings → Agent.
